title: 工具执行失败: read_file
content:
--- 文件: core/memory_retrieval.py (第 1 至 320 行，共 633 行) ---
   1 | """
   2 | 记忆检索模块
   3 | 
   4 | 实现多层级检索功能，支持从三层记忆中快速定位相关信息。
   5 | """
   6 | 
   7 | from dataclasses import dataclass, field
   8 | from datetime import datetime
   9 | from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional, Tuple
  10 | from .memory_models import SessionSummary
  11 | from .memory_layers import WorkingMemory, EpisodicMemory, LongTermMemory
  12 | from .memory_items import MemoryItem, MemoryKind, MemoryRecallResult
  13 | 
  14 | 
  15 | @dataclass
  16 | class MemoryDocument:
  17 |     """统一检索文档：把 MemoryItem / SessionSummary 映射到同一排序空间。"""
  18 | 
  19 |     id: str
  20 |     source_type: str
  21 |     content: str
  22 |     project: str = ""
  23 |     session_id: Optional[str] = None
  24 |     files: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  25 |     concepts: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  26 |     timestamp: str = ""
  27 |     importance: float = 0.5
  28 |     kind: str = MemoryKind.OTHER.value
  29 |     item: Optional[MemoryItem] = None
  30 |     summary: Optional[SessionSummary] = None
  31 |     error_types: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)
  32 | 
  33 |     @classmethod
  34 |     def from_memory_item(cls, item: MemoryItem, source_type: str = "long_term_items") -> "MemoryDocument":
  35 |         raw_observation = item.metadata.get("raw_observation", {}) if item.metadata else {}
  36 |         error_types = []
  37 |         if item.kind == MemoryKind.BUG.value:
  38 |             error_types.extend(item.concepts)
  39 |         if isinstance(raw_observation, dict):
  40 |             error = raw_observation.get("error") or raw_observation.get("tool_output") or ""
  41 |             error_types.extend(_extract_error_types(error))
  42 | 
  43 |         return cls(
  44 |             id=item.id,
  45 |             source_type=source_type,
  46 |             content=item.searchable_text(),
  47 |             project=item.project,
  48 |             session_id=item.source_session_ids[0] if item.source_session_ids else None,
  49 |             files=list(item.files),
  50 |             concepts=list(item.concepts),
  51 |             timestamp=item.updated_at or item.created_at,
  52 |             importance=item.importance,
  53 |             kind=item.kind,
  54 |             item=item,
  55 |             error_types=list(dict.fromkeys(error_types)),
  56 |         )
  57 | 
  58 |     @classmethod
  59 |     def from_session_summary(cls, summary: SessionSummary, source_type: str = "session_summary") -> "MemoryDocument":
  60 |         error_types = [error.error_type for error in summary.errors_encountered]
  61 |         content_parts = [
  62 |             summary.task_goal,
  63 |             summary.summary_text,
  64 |             " ".join(summary.key_decisions),
  65 |             " ".join(fc.summary for fc in summary.files_changed),
  66 |             " ".join(f"{er.error_type} {er.error_message} {er.solution or ''}" for er in summary.errors_encountered),
  67 |             " ".join(tu.tool_name for tu in summary.tools_used),
  68 |         ]
  69 |         return cls(
  70 |             id=f"summary_{summary.session_id}",
  71 |             source_type=source_type,
  72 |             content="\n".join(part for part in content_parts if part),
  73 |             session_id=summary.session_id,
  74 |             files=summary.get_file_paths(),
  75 |             concepts=summary.get_keywords(),
  76 |             timestamp=summary.timestamp,
  77 |             importance=summary.importance,
  78 |             kind=MemoryKind.SUMMARY.value,
  79 |             summary=summary,
  80 |             error_types=error_types,
  81 |         )
  82 | 
  83 |     def to_memory_item(self) -> MemoryItem:
  84 |         if self.item:
  85 |             return self.item
  86 |         if self.summary:
  87 |             return MemoryItem(
  88 |                 id=self.id,
  89 |                 kind=MemoryKind.SUMMARY.value,
 ...
